name: shes-come-undone
description: Wally Lamb's She's Come Undone — a novel about surviving trauma, body shame, mental breakdown, and the long road back to self-acceptance, told through the unforgettable voice of Dolores Price.
useCase: Surviving trauma, body image and eating disorders, mental health and healing, storytelling as survival, rebuilding after loss, unlikely friendship as salvation.
knownRisks: The novel contains scenes of rape and sexual abuse — handle with care
The narrator uses derogatory language about her own body — this is the character's voice, not endorsement
